question: How much PTO do full-time employees accrue?
expected_policy_title: Types of Leave: Paid Time Off (PTO)
reference_answer: Full-time employees accrue Paid Time Off (PTO) per the schedule in Policy 51350 - Types of Leave: Paid Time Off (PTO).

question: Do part-time employees get PTO?
expected_policy_title: Types of Leave: Paid Time Off (PTO) - Part-time
reference_answer: Part-time employees accrue PTO on a pro-rated basis under Policy 51355 - Types of Leave: Paid Time Off (PTO) - Part-time.
